name: Feature request
about: A new engine capability, mechanic, or API
title: ''
labels: enhancement
---

## What

What capability would you like to see, and where it fits in the [roadmap](../../README.md#roadmap).

## Why

What does it unblock? What consumer use case needs it?

## Sketch

Optional: rough API or event-schema shape.

## Alternatives

Any workaround using `CustomEffect` or existing primitives?
